standard.name: Charismatic
standard.description: A natural leader whose presence steadies and uplifts those around them.
effects: +Morale resistance bonus to allies on battle map
Improved persuasion rolls
Cognitive Aptitude reduced by 5%

standard.name: Loyal
standard.description: Unshakeable devotion to companions — fights harder when allies stand close.
effects: +5% bonus damage when adjacent to allied heroes on battle map
Immune to betrayal, conversion spells, curses, and effects

standard.name: Honorable
standard.description: Bound by a personal code of fair conduct, fighting with dignity even against dark odds.
effects: +5% temporary Conviction bonus in fair combat (no ambush or Shadow Art used by hero or any team member)
-10% Conviction penalty whenever any team member uses ambush or Shadow Arts

standard.name: Stoic
standard.description: Unmoved by fear or euphoria, maintaining iron composure in any situation.
effects: Immune to fear and morale loss
Reduced effect from positive morale buffs

standard.name: Disciplined
standard.description: Methodical and precise — sacrifices unpredictability for reliable, consistent performance.
effects: +5% overall damage and +5% to all defences/resistances
-5% chance to land critical strikes

standard.name: Psychopathic
standard.description: Emotionally hollow, deriving a dark satisfaction from eliminating foes.
effects: Immune to morale penalties
Cannot gain morale bonuses from spells, items, or buffs
Permanent morality shift toward Despair each time an enemy is killed in battle

standard.name: Unpredictable
standard.description: Erratic and dangerous — friend and foe alike can never be sure what comes next.
effects: Does not always follow player-chosen actions
Harder to target or counter by enemies

standard.name: Paranoid
standard.description: Trusts no one — a crippling social flaw that is, ironically, tactically invaluable.
effects: Detects ambushes and hidden enemy units
Reduced trust and diplomacy effectiveness

standard.name: Sadistic
standard.description: Thrives on the suffering of enemies, growing more dangerous as foes weaken.
effects: Bloodlust: Bonus damage against weakened enemies
Penalty to diplomacy rolls

standard.name: Impulsive
standard.description: Acts first and thinks later — unpredictably fast but occasionally disastrous.
effects: +10% Initiative
10% chance to ignore player action and choose a different random action instead

combos.name: Cult Leader
combos.description: A magnetic, terrifying figurehead who inspires fanatical devotion — at a cost.
effects: Allies gain +10 Conviction morale on battle map
Stress Cascade: each battle turn enemies deal +1% more damage to all allies (stacks to +50%)
Spell — 'For the Greater Good': sacrifice 50% of an ally's HP to restore 20% HP to all team members

combos.name: Wild Inspirer
combos.description: Charisma run wild — every battle is a gamble on whether their energy uplifts or unravels the team.
effects: Random morale spikes or drops each battle turn for all allies
Chance to trigger team-wide random positive buffs each battle turn

combos.name: Demagogue
combos.description: Brilliantly persuasive yet seen through by everyone — a charismatic liar everyone resents.
effects: Smart-Ass Curse: Hero's Perception permanently reduced by -10% with all factions
Spell — 'Your Mother Was a Hamster': reduces all enemy initiative by 30% once per battle

combos.name: Cruel Commander
combos.description: Commands loyalty through fear and cruelty, turning the battlefield into a slaughterhouse.
effects: Allies deal +10% bonus damage to weakened enemies
Shadow Arts hits cause team-wide +5% Despair shift (stackable) during battle
All allied heroes with Conviction or Neutral alignment suffer -10 permanent Conviction loss

combos.name: Fervent Agitator
combos.description: Infectious recklessness that fires up the whole team — and sometimes gets everyone killed.
effects: Aura of the Fervent: All allies lose -10% initiative but gain +20% critical strike chance

combos.name: Cold Enforcer
combos.description: An unyielding sentinel with no emotion — protects allies without warmth or hesitation.
effects: Strong defensive bonuses within 1 hex of allies on battle map
Receives no morale effects whatsoever
Terrifying Presence: Allied heroes who retreat lose -5% initiative per battle turn for the rest of the battle

combos.name: Erratic Guardian
combos.description: Will protect you — just not necessarily in the way you planned.
effects: Passive random defensive boost to a random ally each turn (before player action): Iron Skin (+5% physical resistance), Shadow Ward (+5% magic resistance), Reflex Shield (+5% dodge), or Stone Footing (+5% stability)
5% chance the effect is negative instead of positive

combos.name: Suspicious Guardian
combos.description: Protects zealously but poisons team morale with distrust.
effects: Auto-detects ambushes on the world map
Large defense bonus when positioned to protect allies
Unsettling Presence: All allied heroes suffer -10 permanent Despair shift to morality

combos.name: Vengeful Protector
combos.description: Retaliates savagely when allies are hurt — inspiring and disturbing in equal measure.
effects: +25% bonus damage against any enemy who attacked an ally on the previous battle turn
Unsettling Presence: All allied heroes suffer -10 permanent Despair shift to morality

combos.name: Reckless Defender
combos.description: Throws themselves in front of danger without a second thought.
effects: Auto-intercepts attacks targeting allies, occasionally absorbing the damage instead
May act uncontrollably on battle map, moving without player input

combos.name: Void Knight
combos.description: A hollow duelist who fights by a personal code of honour that holds no mercy.
effects: Duel Mastery: Bonus combat stats when fighting alone vs a single melee enemy (no allied hero within 1 hex of target)
Immune to all morale buffs and debuffs
Aura of Dread: All allied heroes suffer -5% initiative

combos.name: Chaotic Duelist
combos.description: Fights honourably — but the universe disagrees, rewiring their stats every round.
effects: Strong in all melee duels (alone within 1 hex of enemy)
Random combat modifier applied each battle turn, resetting each turn (e.g. -5 damage, +5% crit, +4 fire damage)

combos.name: Watchful Arbiter
combos.description: A vigilant enforcer of fair combat who makes ambushers pay dearly.
effects: +25% bonus damage against ambush attackers for 5 battle turns
+25% detection bonus vs bandit-type enemies on world map
Receives debuffs when attacked unfairly or ambushed

combos.name: Execution Duelist
combos.description: Honourable in method, monstrous in pleasure — finishes wounded foes with savage joy.
effects: Bonus damage in duels vs weakened enemies (alone within 1 hex of enemy)
+50% critical strike chance against enemies below 10% HP
Disturbing Presence: 5% chance per turn that all allies lose -10% initiative that turn

combos.name: Reckless Knight
combos.description: Charges in first, asks questions never — a glorious and dangerous first-striker.
effects: +25% critical strike chance and bonus crit damage when first to attack an enemy unit
5% chance per turn to auto-initiate an attack regardless of player input

combos.name: Empty Vessel
combos.description: Entirely hollowed out — a weapon, not a person.
effects: Fully immune to all morale effects
Cannot gain any emotional buffs
Extremely stable combat statistics

combos.name: Unstable Anchor
combos.description: Emotionally blank but physically volatile — a strange combination of nothing and chaos.
effects: Ignores all morale effects in game
Random stat shifts applied each battle turn

combos.name: Silent Sentinel
combos.description: Watchful, silent, and deeply alienating — invaluable in defence, unsettling to stand beside.
effects: Ignores all morale effects in game
Detects hidden enemies on battle map
+25% defence when surrounded by enemies
Isolating Presence: Allies skip this hero's action 10% of turns

combos.name: Cold Executioner
combos.description: Kills without hesitation, without remorse, and without ceremony.
effects: Bonus damage against low HP enemies
No morale penalties whatsoever
Aura of the Sociopath: All allies experience random ±1–5 morality shifts each battle turn

combos.name: Rigid Berserker
combos.description: Disciplined rage — once locked onto a target, no magic can stop them.
effects: +10% initiative
Cannot be controlled by mental or charm spells once engaged in combat
Aura of Rabid Focus: All allies experience random ±1–5% damage output shifts each battle turn

combos.name: Calculated Tyrant
combos.description: Wins at any cost — even if that cost is paid in allied blood.
effects: High accuracy on all dice rolls
Cannot be affected by morale effects on battle map
By Any Means: 5% of hero attacks drain 10% HP from a random allied team member

combos.name: Controlled Chaos
combos.description: A brilliantly unstable strategist — their madness is somehow methodical.
effects: Stats and morality cannot be affected by battle map effects
10% chance each allied attack causes AoE damage to all enemies
10% of hero's own attacks (physical and spell) cause 10% AoE splash damage to allies

combos.name: Prepared Strategist
combos.description: Obsessively prepared — always assumes the worst and is almost always right.
effects: Strong bonuses vs all battles triggered by ambush on world map
Increased defensive bonus for all allies within 2 hexes of hero
-10% initiative due to 'Thinking Too Long' effect

combos.name: Ruthless Tactician
combos.description: A cold strategic mind that views suffering as a tool of war.
effects: Aura of the Warlord: All allies deal +25% damage to weakened enemies
When hero drops below 10% HP: all allies take +25% increased damage

combos.name: Overdriven Commander
combos.description: Pushes every ally past their limit — a high-octane leader who never stops pressing the advantage.
effects: +25% initiative and attack precision for hero and all allies on battle map
5% chance per turn: a random allied hero makes a forced aggressive action (losing their other action that turn)
